title: dimerostemma scabrosum
intro: Dimerostemma scabrosum is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine, particularly in the Amazon region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Dimerostemma scabrosum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically used to make infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments.
